markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, legal review, and project status.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** Refresh an existing article for its primary keyword (`AI corporate travel platforms`) and create new, targeted articles for its long-tail rankings (e.g., `AI tools for corporate travel safety`) to capture specific search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**Legal Review:** Use Navan's `compare` pages as a verified source for competitor facts, creating internal "mini battle cards" from their G2-sourced data to streamline the legal approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [**Project Status:** 13 drafts published; 5 new drafts delivered. Navan to approve new ideas in Airtable to unblock GrowthX's creation of a 2–3 month prioritization plan.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Switching to bi-weekly meetings, with the option to schedule ad-hoc syncs via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy: Refresh vs. New

  - [**Problem:** An old article (`AI-powered corporate travel platforms`) ranks for high-intent, bottom-of-funnel (BoFu) keywords but has a search intent mismatch.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [**Solution:** A "pillar-and-satellite" strategy to capture this opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [**Pillar:** Refresh the existing article for its primary keyword, ensuring it doesn't cannibalize other listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [**Satellites:** Create new, targeted articles for each long-tail keyword to provide specific, in-depth content.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

### Legal Review Process

  - [**Requirement:** All competitor facts in public content must be sourced and substantiated for legal record-keeping.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [**Solution:** Leverage Navan's `compare` pages as a verified source.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These pages pull data directly from G2 reviews, providing third-party substantiation that simplifies legal approval.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will create internal "mini battle cards" from this data for consistent, streamlined use.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [**Internal Battle Cards:** Moran's internal battle cards are too aggressive for public content and cannot be shared externally.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

### Content Pipeline & Prioritization

  - [**Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [13 drafts published (2 product listicles).](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [5 new drafts delivered last week.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [2 articles are in second draft review.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**New Ideas:** A large batch of new ideas (tagged `backlog` in Airtable) is ready for review, including:](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [Finance automation topics (per Nima's AMEX GPT course feedback).](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [Expense-related competitive comparisons (e.g., `best corporate credit cards`) to build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [**Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Navan:** Approve all viable ideas in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Use these approvals to create a 2–3 month content prioritization plan.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)

### Project Management & Cadence

  - [**Phase 2 Confirmation:** Libby will get written confirmation from Nima to proceed with Phase 2, which is needed to inform the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Switching to bi-weekly meetings. The next sync is in two weeks; ad-hoc meetings can be scheduled via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Libby:** Get written confirmation from Nima for Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [**Navan Team:** Review and approve new content ideas in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [Create a 2–3 month content prioritization plan after approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [Send new team member jjaneschmidt a project overview in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Create "mini battle cards" from `compare` page data.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Implement the "pillar-and-satellite" strategy for the article on AI corporate travel platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/9uxr9-2cpSfuxe7uyXVBPptdz9nU-4ad?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
